reviews.review_description:
No sense of speed or control. It seems you just go along a path and thats it. Got bored pretty quickly. 

if you could stear, increase or decrease speed, change music or really have any option to do anything at all that would help. 

i am giving it a really  generous three stars in the hope it gets some sort of update. Do let me know. Thanks.
Will not even launch! BS app!! DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY!!
